list.name: Latency spike annotations
list.query: SELECT toUnixTimestamp(toStartOfInterval(eventTime, INTERVAL 10 SECOND)) * 1000 AS time, concat('Latency spike — p95 = ', toString(quantileTDigest(0.95)(processorDurationMs)), ' ms') AS text FROM ph_tx_outcome_v2 WHERE $__timeFilter(eventTime) AND ('${swarm:csv}' IN ('$__all', '.*') OR has(splitByChar(',', '${swarm:csv}'), swarmId)) AND ('${callId:csv}' IN ('$__all', '.*') OR has(splitByChar(',', '${callId:csv}'), callIdKey)) AND ('${businessCode:csv}' IN ('$__all', '.*') OR has(splitByChar(',', '${businessCode:csv}'), businessCodeKey)) GROUP BY time HAVING quantileTDigest(0.95)(processorDurationMs) >= 2000 ORDER BY time DESC LIMIT 100

panels.description: Shows the p95 processor latency for the most recent Grafana time bucket in the selected range. It uses quantileTDigest(0.95) on processorDurationMs, so it reflects recent latency rather than a single p95 for the full selected window.

targets.rawSql: SELECT toStartOfInterval(eventTime, INTERVAL $__interval_s SECOND) AS time, quantileTDigest(0.95)(processorDurationMs) AS value FROM ph_tx_outcome_v2 WHERE $__timeFilter(eventTime) AND ('${swarm:csv}' IN ('$__all', '.*') OR has(splitByChar(',', '${swarm:csv}'), swarmId)) AND ('${callId:csv}' IN ('$__all', '.*') OR has(splitByChar(',', '${callId:csv}'), callIdKey)) AND ('${businessCode:csv}' IN ('$__all', '.*') OR has(splitByChar(',', '${businessCode:csv}'), businessCodeKey)) GROUP BY time ORDER BY time

panels.title: Latest Processor Latency p95 (ms)

panels.description: Shows the percentage of filtered transactions in the selected time range whose processor duration is at least 2000 ms. Unlike the latest stat cards, this panel calculates one value over the full selected window.

targets.rawSql: SELECT now() AS time, avg(if(processorDurationMs >= 2000, 1, 0)) * 100 AS value FROM ph_tx_outcome_v2 WHERE $__timeFilter(eventTime) AND ('${swarm:csv}' IN ('$__all', '.*') OR has(splitByChar(',', '${swarm:csv}'), swarmId)) AND ('${callId:csv}' IN ('$__all', '.*') OR has(splitByChar(',', '${callId:csv}'), callIdKey)) AND ('${businessCode:csv}' IN ('$__all', '.*') OR has(splitByChar(',', '${businessCode:csv}'), businessCodeKey))

panels.title: Transactions Over 2000 ms (%)

panels.description: Shows the latest throughput in transactions per second for the most recent Grafana time bucket. It is calculated as count() divided by $__interval_s, so it reflects recent throughput rather than an average for the full selected range.

targets.rawSql: SELECT toStartOfInterval(eventTime, INTERVAL $__interval_s SECOND) AS time, count() / $__interval_s AS txns FROM ph_tx_outcome_v2 WHERE $__timeFilter(eventTime) AND ('${swarm:csv}' IN ('$__all', '.*') OR has(splitByChar(',', '${swarm:csv}'), swarmId)) AND ('${callId:csv}' IN ('$__all', '.*') OR has(splitByChar(',', '${callId:csv}'), callIdKey)) AND ('${businessCode:csv}' IN ('$__all', '.*') OR has(splitByChar(',', '${businessCode:csv}'), businessCodeKey)) GROUP BY time ORDER BY time

panels.title: Latest Throughput (TPS)

panels.description: Shows the share of transactions in each Grafana time bucket split into ok, over-2000-ms breaches, and technical failures by processorStatus code. Statuses 200, 201, 422, and -1 are treated as accepted for this panel. All technical failure status codes are shown individually and are not grouped into a top-3 or other bucket. Green means ok, amber means over 2000 ms, and red shades indicate technical failures.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  toStartOfInterval(eventTime, INTERVAL $__interval_s SECOND) AS time,
  multiIf(
    processorStatus NOT IN (200, 201, 422, -1), concat('technical-failure | status ', toString(processorStatus)),
    processorDurationMs >= 2000, 'breach-over-2000ms',
    'ok'
  ) AS series,
  count() AS events
FROM ph_tx_outcome_v2
WHERE $__timeFilter(eventTime)
  AND ('${swarm:csv}' IN ('$__all', '.*') OR has(splitByChar(',', '${swarm:csv}'), swarmId))
  AND ('${callId:csv}' IN ('$__all', '.*') OR has(splitByChar(',', '${callId:csv}'), callIdKey))
  AND ('${businessCode:csv}' IN ('$__all', '.*') OR has(splitByChar(',', '${businessCode:csv}'), businessCodeKey))
GROUP BY time, series
ORDER BY time, series

panels.title: Transaction Health Over Time

panels.description: Shows the overall share of filtered transactions in the selected time range that were technical failures. A transaction counts as a technical failure when processorStatus is not 200, 201, 422, or -1. This is easier to read than a peak bucket metric because it does not depend on Grafana bucket size.

targets.rawSql: SELECT now() AS time, countIf(processorStatus NOT IN (200, 201, 422, -1)) * 100.0 / count() AS technical_failure_rate_pct FROM ph_tx_outcome_v2 WHERE $__timeFilter(eventTime) AND ('${swarm:csv}' IN ('$__all', '.*') OR has(splitByChar(',', '${swarm:csv}'), swarmId)) AND ('${callId:csv}' IN ('$__all', '.*') OR has(splitByChar(',', '${callId:csv}'), callIdKey)) AND ('${businessCode:csv}' IN ('$__all', '.*') OR has(splitByChar(',', '${businessCode:csv}'), businessCodeKey))

panels.title: Technical Failure Share (%)

panels.description: Shows the highest transactions-per-second rate seen in any fixed 10-second bucket within the selected time range. This is useful for comparing peak load across test runs without depending on Grafana's adaptive bucket size.

targets.rawSql: SELECT now() AS time, max(txns_per_sec) AS value FROM (SELECT toStartOfInterval(eventTime, INTERVAL 10 SECOND) AS bucket_time, count() / 10.0 AS txns_per_sec FROM ph_tx_outcome_v2 WHERE $__timeFilter(eventTime) AND ('${swarm:csv}' IN ('$__all', '.*') OR has(splitByChar(',', '${swarm:csv}'), swarmId)) AND ('${callId:csv}' IN ('$__all', '.*') OR has(splitByChar(',', '${callId:csv}'), callIdKey)) AND ('${businessCode:csv}' IN ('$__all', '.*') OR has(splitByChar(',', '${businessCode:csv}'), businessCodeKey)) GROUP BY bucket_time)

panels.title: Peak Throughput (TPS, 10s window)

panels.description: Shows the maximum processor latency in each Grafana time bucket across all returned group series. The visible legend label is built from callId and businessCode, and each point is the maximum processorDurationMs returned for that displayed series in that bucket.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  toStartOfInterval(eventTime, INTERVAL $__interval_s SECOND) AS time,
  concat(
    swarmId,
    ' | ',
    callIdKey,
    ' | ',
    businessCodeKey
  ) AS series,
  max(processorDurationMs) AS value
FROM ph_tx_outcome_v2
WHERE $__timeFilter(eventTime)
  AND ('${swarm:csv}' IN ('$__all', '.*') OR has(splitByChar(',', '${swarm:csv}'), swarmId))
  AND ('${callId:csv}' IN ('$__all', '.*') OR has(splitByChar(',', '${callId:csv}'), callIdKey))
  AND ('${businessCode:csv}' IN ('$__all', '.*') OR has(splitByChar(',', '${businessCode:csv}'), businessCodeKey))
GROUP BY time, swarmId, callIdKey, businessCodeKey
ORDER BY time, series

panels.title: All Groups: Processor Latency Max (ms)

panels.description: Shows business success rate by Grafana time bucket for each swarmId, callId, and businessCode combination in the selected range. Each line is the average of businessSuccess multiplied by 100 for that combination in each bucket.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  toStartOfInterval(eventTime, INTERVAL $__interval_s SECOND) AS time,
  concat(swarmId, ' | ', callIdKey, ' | ', businessCodeKey) AS series,
  avg(businessSuccess) * 100 AS success_pct
FROM ph_tx_outcome_v2
WHERE $__timeFilter(eventTime)
  AND ('${swarm:csv}' IN ('$__all', '.*') OR has(splitByChar(',', '${swarm:csv}'), swarmId))
  AND ('${callId:csv}' IN ('$__all', '.*') OR has(splitByChar(',', '${callId:csv}'), callIdKey))
  AND ('${businessCode:csv}' IN ('$__all', '.*') OR has(splitByChar(',', '${businessCode:csv}'), businessCodeKey))
GROUP BY time, swarmId, callIdKey, businessCodeKey
ORDER BY time, series

panels.title: Business Success Rate by Swarm / Call / Business Code

panels.description: Shows processor success rate by Grafana time bucket for each swarmId, callId, and businessCode combination in the selected range. Each line is the average of processorSuccess multiplied by 100 for that combination in each bucket.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  toStartOfInterval(eventTime, INTERVAL $__interval_s SECOND) AS time,
  concat(swarmId, ' | ', callIdKey, ' | ', businessCodeKey) AS series,
  avg(processorSuccess) * 100 AS success_pct
FROM ph_tx_outcome_v2
WHERE $__timeFilter(eventTime)
  AND ('${swarm:csv}' IN ('$__all', '.*') OR has(splitByChar(',', '${swarm:csv}'), swarmId))
  AND ('${callId:csv}' IN ('$__all', '.*') OR has(splitByChar(',', '${callId:csv}'), callIdKey))
  AND ('${businessCode:csv}' IN ('$__all', '.*') OR has(splitByChar(',', '${businessCode:csv}'), businessCodeKey))
GROUP BY time, swarmId, callIdKey, businessCodeKey
ORDER BY time, series

panels.title: Processor Success Rate by Swarm / Call / Business Code

panels.description: Shows the 8 group combinations with the highest peak processor latency in the selected range. The base series plot maximum latency per Grafana time bucket for each selected group, and the highlighted overlay marks only the points above 1000 ms.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  toStartOfInterval(eventTime, INTERVAL $__interval_s SECOND) AS time,
  concat(
    swarmId,
    ' | ',
    callIdKey,
    ' | ',
    businessCodeKey
  ) AS call,
  max(processorDurationMs) AS latency_max_ms
FROM ph_tx_outcome_v2
WHERE $__timeFilter(eventTime)
  AND ('${swarm:csv}' IN ('$__all', '.*') OR has(splitByChar(',', '${swarm:csv}'), swarmId))
  AND ('${callId:csv}' IN ('$__all', '.*') OR has(splitByChar(',', '${callId:csv}'), callIdKey))
  AND ('${businessCode:csv}' IN ('$__all', '.*') OR has(splitByChar(',', '${businessCode:csv}'), businessCodeKey))
  AND concat(
    swarmId,
    ' | ',
    callIdKey,
    ' | ',
    businessCodeKey
  ) IN (
    SELECT call
    FROM (
      SELECT
        concat(
          swarmId,
          ' | ',
          callIdKey,
          ' | ',
          businessCodeKey
        ) AS call,
        max(processorDurationMs) AS peak_latency_ms
      FROM ph_tx_outcome_v2
      WHERE $__timeFilter(eventTime)
        AND ('${swarm:csv}' IN ('$__all', '.*') OR has(splitByChar(',', '${swarm:csv}'), swarmId))
        AND ('${callId:csv}' IN ('$__all', '.*') OR has(splitByChar(',', '${callId:csv}'), callIdKey))
        AND ('${businessCode:csv}' IN ('$__all', '.*') OR has(splitByChar(',', '${businessCode:csv}'), businessCodeKey))
      GROUP BY swarmId, callIdKey, businessCodeKey
      ORDER BY peak_latency_ms DESC
      LIMIT 8
    )
  )
GROUP BY time, swarmId, callIdKey, businessCodeKey
ORDER BY time, call

SELECT
  toStartOfInterval(eventTime, INTERVAL $__interval_s SECOND) AS time,
  concat(
    swarmId,
    ' | ',
    callIdKey,
    ' | ',
    businessCodeKey
  ) AS call,
  max(processorDurationMs) AS latency_max_ms
FROM ph_tx_outcome_v2
WHERE $__timeFilter(eventTime)
  AND ('${swarm:csv}' IN ('$__all', '.*') OR has(splitByChar(',', '${swarm:csv}'), swarmId))
  AND ('${callId:csv}' IN ('$__all', '.*') OR has(splitByChar(',', '${callId:csv}'), callIdKey))
  AND ('${businessCode:csv}' IN ('$__all', '.*') OR has(splitByChar(',', '${businessCode:csv}'), businessCodeKey))
  AND concat(
    swarmId,
    ' | ',
    callIdKey,
    ' | ',
    businessCodeKey
  ) IN (
    SELECT call
    FROM (
      SELECT
        concat(
          swarmId,
          ' | ',
          callIdKey,
          ' | ',
          businessCodeKey
        ) AS call,
        max(processorDurationMs) AS peak_latency_ms
      FROM ph_tx_outcome_v2
      WHERE $__timeFilter(eventTime)
        AND ('${swarm:csv}' IN ('$__all', '.*') OR has(splitByChar(',', '${swarm:csv}'), swarmId))
        AND ('${callId:csv}' IN ('$__all', '.*') OR has(splitByChar(',', '${callId:csv}'), callIdKey))
        AND ('${businessCode:csv}' IN ('$__all', '.*') OR has(splitByChar(',', '${businessCode:csv}'), businessCodeKey))
      GROUP BY swarmId, callIdKey, businessCodeKey
      ORDER BY peak_latency_ms DESC
      LIMIT 8
    )
  )
GROUP BY time, swarmId, callIdKey, businessCodeKey
HAVING latency_max_ms > 1000
ORDER BY time, call

panels.title: Top 8 Highest-Latency Groups

panels.description: Latency drill-down table for the selected range. Adapted from the RTT-style percentile view, but this dashboard's dataset exposes processorDurationMs, so the p50/p95/p99 and max columns represent processor latency percentiles for each swarm / call / business-code group.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  swarmId,
  callIdLabel AS callId,
  businessCodeLabel AS businessCode,
  txns,
  avg_duration_ms,
  p50_duration_ms,
  p95_duration_ms,
  p99_duration_ms,
  max_duration_ms
FROM (
  SELECT
    swarmId,
    callIdKey AS callIdLabel,
    businessCodeKey AS businessCodeLabel,
    count() AS txns,
    round(avg(processorDurationMs), 1) AS avg_duration_ms,
    round(quantileTDigest(0.50)(processorDurationMs), 1) AS p50_duration_ms,
    round(quantileTDigest(0.95)(processorDurationMs), 1) AS p95_duration_ms,
    round(quantileTDigest(0.99)(processorDurationMs), 1) AS p99_duration_ms,
    round(max(processorDurationMs), 1) AS max_duration_ms
  FROM ph_tx_outcome_v2
  WHERE $__timeFilter(eventTime)
    AND ('${swarm:csv}' IN ('$__all', '.*') OR has(splitByChar(',', '${swarm:csv}'), swarmId))
    AND ('${callId:csv}' IN ('$__all', '.*') OR has(splitByChar(',', '${callId:csv}'), callIdKey))
    AND ('${businessCode:csv}' IN ('$__all', '.*') OR has(splitByChar(',', '${businessCode:csv}'), businessCodeKey))
  GROUP BY swarmId, callIdLabel, businessCodeLabel
)
ORDER BY p99_duration_ms DESC, max_duration_ms DESC
LIMIT 50

panels.title: Latency Percentiles by Group (p50 / p95 / p99)

panels.description: Shows the 50 highest-volume transaction groups in the selected range, ranked by transaction count. Each row summarizes one swarmId, callId, and businessCode combination with processor statuses, count, latency percentiles, and processor and business success rates.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  swarmId,
  callIdLabel AS callId,
  businessCodeLabel AS businessCode,
  processorStatuses,
  txns,
  avg_duration_ms,
  p50_duration_ms,
  p95_duration_ms,
  p99_duration_ms,
  processor_success_pct,
  business_success_pct
FROM (
  SELECT
    swarmId,
    callIdKey AS callIdLabel,
    businessCodeKey AS businessCodeLabel,
    arrayStringConcat(arraySort(groupUniqArray(toString(processorStatus))), ', ') AS processorStatuses,
    count() AS txns,
    round(avg(processorDurationMs), 1) AS avg_duration_ms,
    round(quantileTDigest(0.50)(processorDurationMs), 1) AS p50_duration_ms,
    round(quantileTDigest(0.95)(processorDurationMs), 1) AS p95_duration_ms,
    round(quantileTDigest(0.99)(processorDurationMs), 1) AS p99_duration_ms,
    round(avg(processorSuccess) * 100, 2) AS processor_success_pct,
    round(avg(businessSuccess) * 100, 2) AS business_success_pct
  FROM ph_tx_outcome_v2
  WHERE $__timeFilter(eventTime)
    AND ('${swarm:csv}' IN ('$__all', '.*') OR has(splitByChar(',', '${swarm:csv}'), swarmId))
    AND ('${callId:csv}' IN ('$__all', '.*') OR has(splitByChar(',', '${callId:csv}'), callIdKey))
    AND ('${businessCode:csv}' IN ('$__all', '.*') OR has(splitByChar(',', '${businessCode:csv}'), businessCodeKey))
  GROUP BY swarmId, callIdLabel, businessCodeLabel
)
ORDER BY txns DESC
LIMIT 50

panels.title: Top Transaction Groups by Volume

panels.description: Shows total transaction count per hour for the selected range. Each bar is the exact count of filtered transactions whose eventTime falls into that hour.

targets.rawSql: SELECT toStartOfHour(eventTime) AS time, count() AS total_transactions FROM ph_tx_outcome_v2 WHERE $__timeFilter(eventTime) AND ('${swarm:csv}' IN ('$__all', '.*') OR has(splitByChar(',', '${swarm:csv}'), swarmId)) AND ('${callId:csv}' IN ('$__all', '.*') OR has(splitByChar(',', '${callId:csv}'), callIdKey)) AND ('${businessCode:csv}' IN ('$__all', '.*') OR has(splitByChar(',', '${businessCode:csv}'), businessCodeKey)) GROUP BY time ORDER BY time

panels.title: Total Transactions per Hour

list.definition: SELECT swarmId FROM ph_tx_outcome_v2 GROUP BY swarmId ORDER BY swarmId LIMIT 200
list.label: Swarm
list.name: swarm
list.query: SELECT swarmId FROM ph_tx_outcome_v2 GROUP BY swarmId ORDER BY swarmId LIMIT 200

list.definition: SELECT callIdKey FROM ph_tx_outcome_v2 GROUP BY callIdKey ORDER BY callIdKey LIMIT 200
list.label: Call ID
list.name: callId
list.query: SELECT callIdKey FROM ph_tx_outcome_v2 GROUP BY callIdKey ORDER BY callIdKey LIMIT 200

list.definition: SELECT businessCodeKey FROM ph_tx_outcome_v2 GROUP BY businessCodeKey ORDER BY businessCodeKey LIMIT 200

list.query: SELECT businessCodeKey FROM ph_tx_outcome_v2 GROUP BY businessCodeKey ORDER BY businessCodeKey LIMIT 200
